message:
feat: add signal handling and secure port defaults for Microsoft compatibility

Critical runtime improvements:

- Add graceful signal handling with SIGTERM trap (matches Microsoft pattern)
- Add --sig-proxy=false for proper signal delegation
- Fix port binding security: default to 127.0.0.1 instead of 0.0.0.0
- Use Microsoft's signal-aware container lifecycle pattern
- Update tests to expect secure localhost port binding

These changes provide:
- Graceful container shutdown on signals
- Secure port forwarding (localhost only by default)
- Better compatibility with Microsoft's devcontainer behavior
- Improved container lifecycle management

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
